summary: All discovered Retell and Pipedream references found via field metadata and workflow rule names

retell_references.note: Test field, likely for validating Retell IVR flow

retell_references.name: TriggerRettelIVR
retell_references.note: Primary active Retell IVR trigger - fires on every Phone Call create/edit

retell_references.name: AI - Handle Failed/Retry Phone Calls
retell_references.note: AI-driven retry logic, likely coordinating with Retell

pipedream_references.field_label: Pipedream Update Zoho Crm Trace Id
pipedream_references.note: Trace ID written by Pipedream when updating a Phone Call record back to Zoho
Trace ID from Pipedream when it triggers IVR

ivr_flow_summary: Service Schedules trigger date-based workflows (S.Schedules.Daily Clock In/Out) -> Creates Phone_Call records -> TriggerPipeDreamIVR and TriggerRettelIVR fire on create_or_edit -> Pipedream/Retell process the call -> Response written back to Phone_Call_Response and Status fields -> Failed Phone Call Notifications and AI - Handle Failed/Retry rules manage retries
